title: senecio sotikensis
intro: Senecio sotikensis, also known as the Sotik Groundsel, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to Kenya. The medicinal properties of Senecio sotikensis include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, offering several health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Senecio sotikensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
